03=Partial/moderate assistance 
02=Substantial/maximal assistance 
01=Dependent 

If activity was not attempted, code reason:
07=Resident refused
09=Not applicable 
10=Not attempted due to environmental limitations (e.g., lack of equipment, weather constraints)
88=Not attempted due to medical condition or safety concerns effective 10/01/2023
894 LWR_DRSNG_INTRM_CD LWR_DRSNG_INTRM_CD GG0130G5 Lower body dressing (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to dress and undress
